data.title: Researcher suggests Bitcoin mining and AI are moving towards opposing paths of decentralization.
data.description: The latest data reports a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country, with more than 10,000 new infections confirmed in the past 24 hours. The total number of active cases has risen to over 75,000, prompting authorities to implement stricter restrictions to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, the death toll has climbed to over 1,500, with projections suggesting a further rise in fatalities in the coming weeks. Hospitals are reportedly facing immense pressure as the healthcare system struggles to cope with the surge in patients. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures and guidelines to prevent further escalation of the crisis.

data.title: Aktsiaselts Infortar own share acquisition transactions
data.description: Between April 6th and April 10th, 2026, Aktsiaselts Infortar purchased its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: Data Published in Nature Communications Highlights Unique Mechanism of Action of Alpibectir in Combination with Ethionamide (AlpE)
data.description: Switzerland-based BioVersys AG, traded as SIX: BIOV, a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, released pre-clinical findings in Nature Communications for their anti-tuberculosis combination AlpE. The company specializes in developing antibacterial products for severe infections from multi-drug resistant bacteria. The published data highlights the effectiveness of AlpE in combating tuberculosis, a major global health concern. BioVersys AG continues to advance in their research and development efforts to address the challenges posed by MDR bacteria.
Sanofi announces Dupixent approval for pediatric patients under 12 across multiple chronic diseases

data.title: Dupixent® (dupilumab) Approved in the EU as the First Targeted Medicine to Treat Young Children with Chronic Spontaneous Urticaria (CSU)
data.description: The CSU has recently approved the use of Dupixent for children aged 2 to 11 years. This decision was informed by data obtained from the LIBERTY-CUPID clinical trial program. The efficacy data from the trials demonstrated that Dupixent led to a significant reduction in urticaria activity when compared to a placebo in adult patients. This approval opens up a new treatment option for young individuals suffering from chronic spontaneous urticaria.
Rentokil sees price target upgraded by Peel Hunt from 352p to 454p

data.title: Press Release: Sanofi and Regeneron’s Dupixent approved in the EU as the first targeted medicine to treat young children with chronic spontaneous urticaria
data.description: Sanofi and Regeneron have gained approval for Dupixent in the EU, making it the initial targeted medication for treating chronic spontaneous urticaria in young children. This marks a significant advancement in healthcare, offering a promising solution for those affected by this condition. The approval opens up a new treatment pathway for children grappling with chronic spontaneous urticaria, which impacts a considerable number of young individuals across the region. This development underscores the importance of innovative medicines in addressing unmet medical needs, with Dupixent paving the way for improved quality of life for pediatric patients with this condition.

data.title: Netic and OVHcloud Forge Strategic Partnership to Bolster Digital Sovereignty for Danish Enterprises, Public & Highly Regulated Sectors
data.description: Netic and OVHcloud have joined forces in a strategic partnership aimed at enhancing digital sovereignty for Danish business entities, as well as public and highly regulated industries. This collaboration is significant for Denmark as it strives for enhanced control and ownership over its digital assets. The partnership aims to provide secure and reliable cloud services tailored to the specific needs of Danish enterprises. This move comes at a time when digital security and sovereignty have become crucial priorities for organizations globally. Netic and OVHcloud's combined expertise will offer a strong foundation for Danish businesses, ensuring robust protection and compliance measures. This collaboration is set to benefit a wide range of sectors, including public institutions and organizations operating in highly regulated industries. With Netic and OVHcloud's partnership, Danish enterprises can expect enhanced digital sovereignty and security in an increasingly interconnected world.

data.title: TGS Q1 2026 Operational Update
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on April 13, 2026, TGS, a prominent international supplier of energy data and insights, releases a quarterly operational report just six business days following the end of each quarter.

data.title: Roche receives CE mark for new Elecsys NfL blood test to detect neuroinflammation in multiple sclerosis
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Roche (SIX: RO, ROP; OTCQX: RHHBY) disclosed that its Elecsys® Neurofilament Light Chain (NfL) test has obtained CE mark approval for identifying neuroinflammation in patients with relapsing remitting multiple sclerosis (RRMS). The test signifies a significant advancement in MS care by offering clinicians a non-invasive method to track the biological harm caused by MS. By evaluating NfL levels in a blood sample - a protein released during nerve cell damage - Elecsys NfL provides insights into the neuroinflammation linked with MS. This could potentially enable more frequent monitoring for individuals managing the disease.

data.title: GAM Holding AG announces proposed Board of Directors for election at 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: GAM Holding AG has revealed the proposed lineup for their Board of Directors who will stand for election at the 2026 Annual General Meeting set to take place on 12 May 2026 in Zurich. This announcement comes as the company, listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange under the ticker symbol GAM, gears up for the meeting.

data.title: WISeSat and Swiss Space Command of the Swiss Armed Forces Complete Pilot Phase and Prepare Next-Generation WISeSat 6U Mission Planned for November 2026
data.description: Swiss Space Command of the Swiss Armed Forces, in collaboration with WISeSat, has successfully concluded the pilot phase. They are now gearing up for the next-gen WISeSat 6U mission scheduled for November 2026.

data.title: Analytic Edge Recognized as TikTok Measurement Badged Partner
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on April 13, 2026, Analytic Edge, a subsidiary of C5i, a leading provider of AI-driven marketing analytics solutions, revealed its new status as an authorized TikTok Marketing Partner within the measurement sector. The designation is specifically for Media Mix Modeling (MMM). This accreditation serves to enhance Analytic Edge's recognition within the marketing industry and solidify its expertise in this area.
